AWSAppRunnerConfig.description:
AWS App Runner deployment configuration.

Attributes:
    region: AWS region for deployment
    cpu: vCPU allocation (1, 2, or 4)
    memory: Memory allocation in MB (2048, 3072, 4096, 8192, or 12288)
    ecr_role_arn: IAM role ARN for ECR access
    health_check_path: Path for health checks
    auto_scaling_min: Minimum instances
    auto_scaling_max: Maximum instances

ecr_role_arn.description: IAM role ARN for ECR access
ecr_role_arn.title: Ecr Role Arn

AWSAppRunnerConfig.title: AWSAppRunnerConfig

AzureContainerAppsConfig.description:
Azure Container Apps deployment configuration.

Attributes:
    subscription_id: Azure subscription ID (UUID)
    resource_group: Azure resource group name
    environment_name: Container Apps environment name
    location: Azure region for deployment
    cpu: vCPU allocation
    memory: Memory allocation (e.g., 2Gi)
    ingress_external: Whether ingress is external
    min_replicas: Minimum replicas
    max_replicas: Maximum replicas

cpu.description: vCPU allocation (0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1.0, 1.25, 1.5, 1.75, 2.0). Default raised to 1.0 in spec 034 P1a — Anthropic's hosting guide recommends 1 CPU per Claude SDK instance, and the serve layer derives the default session cap from this value.
cpu.title: Cpu

memory.description: Memory allocation (e.g. 2Gi). Default raised to 2Gi in spec 034 P1a so concurrent SDK subprocesses fit in the cgroup limit. ACA requires memory_Gi == 2 * cpu_cores.
memory.title: Memory

ingress_external.description: Whether ingress is reachable from the public internet. Default flipped to False in spec 034 P1a — operators must explicitly opt in to public ingress to avoid accidentally exposing internal-only agents.
ingress_external.title: Ingress External

AzureContainerAppsConfig.title: AzureContainerAppsConfig

AzureMonitorExporterConfig.description:
Azure Monitor exporter configuration.

Exports telemetry directly to Azure Monitor / Application Insights.
AzureMonitorExporterConfig.title: AzureMonitorExporterConfig

ChunkingStrategy.description:
Document chunking approach for HierarchicalDocumentTool.

Defines how documents are split into chunks:
- STRUCTURE: Parse markdown headings and split at structural boundaries
- TOKEN: Fixed token-based splitting with overlap (fallback for flat text)
ChunkingStrategy.title: ChunkingStrategy

ClaudeConfig.description:
Claude Agent SDK-specific settings.

All fields optional. All capabilities default to disabled (least-privilege).

working_directory.description: Scope agent file access to this path. Subprocess cwd.
working_directory.title: Working Directory

permission_mode.description: Level of autonomous action. Defaults to manual (safest).

max_turns.description: Maximum agent loop iterations. None = SDK default.
max_turns.title: Max Turns

max_concurrent_sessions.description: Maximum concurrent active turns per serve instance — under spec 034 P4 each in-flight turn spawns a fresh SDK subprocess, so this gates memory exposure. When unset, the serve layer derives the cap from the replica's cgroup memory limit divided by `session_memory_estimate_mib`. Field name retained for backward compatibility with existing agent.yaml files. Upper bound 500 allows operators to admit many idle threads (open sessions are now nearly free — JSONL transcripts on disk, no resident subprocess) while the semaphore enforces the actual memory cap on concurrent active turns. Spec 034 P1a + P4.
max_concurrent_sessions.title: Max Concurrent Sessions

session_memory_estimate_mib.description: Estimated peak resident memory (MiB) per *concurrent active turn* (SDK subprocess + tool state during a single in-flight query). Under spec 034 P4 this is no longer per-idle-session — idle sessions cost ~30 MiB each (Python object + JSONL handle) since the subprocess is spawned per turn and torn down at turn end. Used by the serve layer to derive `max_concurrent_sessions` from the replica's cgroup memory limit. The 500 MiB default is calibrated against the spec 034 P4 cloud validation: a 2 GiB ACA replica OOMed at 4 concurrent turns, and 3 was the empirically safe ceiling — `(2048-400)/500 = 3` matches that. The footprint covers the ~300 MiB Node CLI steady state plus simultaneous startup spikes and parent-side transient work (hybrid search, rerank, context generation). Tune up for tool-heavy agents.
session_memory_estimate_mib.title: Session Memory Estimate Mib

agents.description: Named subagent definitions. Each entry becomes an AgentDefinition on ClaudeAgentOptions.agents. Subagents share parent MCP servers and use their `tools` allowlist to scope MCP tool access.
agents.title: Agents

allowed_tools.description: Explicit tool allowlist. None = all configured tools.
allowed_tools.title: Allowed Tools

effort.description: Thinking effort level. SDK accepts low|medium|high|max.
effort.title: Effort

max_budget_usd.description: Hard cap on session spend in USD. Must be > 0.
max_budget_usd.title: Max Budget Usd

fallback_model.description: Model used when the primary model is unavailable.
fallback_model.title: Fallback Model

disallowed_tools.description: Tools that must never be used; takes precedence over allowed_tools.
disallowed_tools.title: Disallowed Tools

setting_sources.description: Which Claude Code settings layers the spawned SDK subprocess should load. HoloDeck defaults to full isolation: when this is ``None`` (default), the backend passes ``[]`` to the SDK so the subprocess does not inherit plugins, skills, hooks, etc. from the host's ``~/.claude`` or the project's ``.claude/`` directories. Set to any subset of ``['user', 'project', 'local']`` to opt back in, or to ``['all']`` as sugar for all three. ``'all'`` cannot be combined with other values. ``'project'`` must be included if your agents rely on ``CLAUDE.md`` files.
setting_sources.title: Setting Sources

i_understand_this_is_unsafe.description: Acknowledge that permission_mode=acceptAll disables the Claude SDK permission system entirely, allowing any tool (including Bash, Write, Edit, WebFetch) to execute without restriction. This is the most direct path from prompt-injection to arbitrary tool execution. Required to use permission_mode=acceptAll. Prefer declaring the specific tools your agent needs via the schema fields (bash, file_system, web_search) or claude.allowed_tools instead.
i_understand_this_is_unsafe.title: I Understand This Is Unsafe

disable_default_hooks.description: Disable HoloDeck-provided default hooks (credential redaction PostToolUse hook). When True, the agent runs with ONLY user-defined hooks. Loud warning emitted at load time. Spec 034 P2b. Note: OTel attribute redaction runs independently and is NOT disabled by this flag.
disable_default_hooks.title: Disable Default Hooks

disable_subprocess_env_scrub.description: Disable HoloDeck's default-on subprocess env scrubbing (CLAUDE_CODE_SUBPROCESS_ENV_SCRUB + CLAUDE_CODE_MCP_ALLOWLIST_ENV). When True, Bash tool subprocesses and stdio MCP servers inherit the full agent container env including Anthropic and cloud provider credentials. Spec 034 P2b.
disable_subprocess_env_scrub.title: Disable Subprocess Env Scrub

ClaudeConfig.title: ClaudeConfig

CloudTargetConfig.description:
Cloud deployment target configuration.

Uses a discriminated union pattern to ensure provider-specific
configuration matches the selected provider.

Attributes:
    provider: Cloud provider (aws, gcp, azure)
    aws: AWS App Runner configuration
    gcp: GCP Cloud Run configuration
    azure: Azure Container Apps configuration
CloudTargetConfig.title: CloudTargetConfig

CodeMetric.description:
User-supplied Python grader metric (data-model.md §6).

Discriminator: ``type: code``. The ``grader`` path is resolved at config
load time — ``importlib.import_module`` + ``getattr`` — so bad references
surface as ``ConfigError`` *before* any agent call (FR-025).

The resolved callable is cached in a private attribute so each turn's
grader invocation doesn't re-import.

type.description: Discriminator field — always 'code' for user graders.
type.title: Type

threshold.description: Applied if grader returns a float without explicit passed flag.
threshold.title: Threshold

fail_on_error.description: If true, grader exceptions fail the whole test case.
fail_on_error.title: Fail On Error

name.description: Optional display name; defaults to the callable name.
name.title: Name

CodeMetric.title: CodeMetric

CommandType.description:
Allowed stdio commands for MCP servers (security constraint).

Only these commands are permitted for spawning MCP server processes
to prevent command injection attacks:
- NPX: Node.js/npm package runner
- NODE: Direct Node.js script runner
- UVX: Python/uv package runner
- DOCKER: Docker container runner
CommandType.title: CommandType

ConsoleExporterConfig.description:
Console exporter configuration.

Used as the default exporter when no other exporters are explicitly enabled.
Outputs telemetry to stdout for development/debugging purposes.
ConsoleExporterConfig.title: ConsoleExporterConfig

DatabaseConfig.description:
Vector database connection configuration.

Supports all Semantic Kernel vector store providers including PostgreSQL,
Azure AI Search, Qdrant, Weaviate, ChromaDB, FAISS, Pinecone, and more.

Provider-specific parameters are passed via the config dict:
- postgres: connection_string
- azure-ai-search: connection_string, api_key
- qdrant: url, api_key (optional)
- weaviate: url, api_key (optional)
- chromadb: path or host
- faiss: path
- pinecone: api_key, index_name
- And more...

provider.description: Vector database provider: postgres, azure-ai-search, qdrant, weaviate, chromadb, faiss, azure-cosmos-mongo, azure-cosmos-nosql, sql-server, pinecone, in-memory
provider.title: Provider

connection_string.description: Database connection string (format depends on provider). Examples: postgresql://user:pass@host/db, https://search-service.search.windows.net
connection_string.title: Connection String

DatabaseConfig.title: DatabaseConfig

DeploymentConfig.description:
Main deployment configuration model.

Attributes:
    runtime: Runtime type (currently only container)
    registry: Container registry configuration
    target: Cloud deployment target configuration
    protocol: API protocol type
    port: Container port to expose
    health_check_path: HTTP path for health checks (e.g., /health, /healthz)
    environment: Environment variables for the container
    platform: Target platform for container image (e.g., linux/amd64, linux/arm64)

platform.description: Target platform for container image (e.g., linux/amd64)
platform.title: Platform

DeploymentConfig.title: DeploymentConfig

DocumentDomain.description:
Predefined document structure patterns for subsection detection.

Enables YAML-based configuration of domain-specific parsing rules
for hierarchical document tools. Each domain defines subsection patterns
that recognize implicit headings in documents.

Attributes:
    NONE: No subsection patterns (default, backward compatible).
    US_LEGISLATIVE: US Code style: (a), (1), (A), (i) hierarchy.
    AU_LEGISLATIVE: Australian style: (1), (a), (i), (A) hierarchy.
    ACADEMIC: Academic papers: 1., 1.1, 1.1.1 numbered sections.
    TECHNICAL: Technical manuals: Step 1, 1.1, Note:, Warning:.
    LEGAL_CONTRACT: Legal contracts: Article I, Section 1, (a) clauses.
DocumentDomain.title: DocumentDomain

EvaluationConfig.description:
Evaluation framework configuration.

Container for evaluation metrics with optional default model configuration.
Supports standard EvaluationMetric, GEvalMetric (custom criteria), and
RAGMetric (RAG pipeline evaluation).

model.description: Default LLM model for all metrics

metrics.description: List of metrics to evaluate (standard, GEval, or RAG)
metrics.title: Metrics

EvaluationConfig.title: EvaluationConfig

EvaluationMetric.description:
Evaluation metric configuration.

Represents a single evaluation metric with flexible model configuration,
including per-metric LLM model overrides.

metric.description: Built-in metric name. One of: groundedness, relevance, coherence, fluency, bleu, rouge, meteor, equality, numeric.
metric.title: Metric

model.description: LLM model override for this metric

fail_on_error.description: Fail test if metric evaluation fails
fail_on_error.title: Fail On Error

timeout_ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds for LLM calls
timeout_ms.title: Timeout Ms

absolute_tolerance.description: [numeric] Pass when abs(actual - expected) <= absolute_tolerance (inclusive; FR-018).
absolute_tolerance.title: Absolute Tolerance

relative_tolerance.description: [numeric] Pass when abs(actual - expected) <= relative_tolerance * abs(expected).
relative_tolerance.title: Relative Tolerance

response_path.description: Optional path into a JSON-encoded response. When set, the evaluator grades the leaf value at this path (coerced to str) instead of the raw response. Grammar: dotted keys with optional bracketed indices — 'answer', 'result.value', 'items[0].score'.
response_path.title: Response Path

EvaluationMetric.title: EvaluationMetric

ExecutionConfig.description:
Test execution configuration.

Specifies execution parameters for agent test runs, including timeouts,
caching, and logging options.

llm_timeout.description: LLM API call timeout in seconds
llm_timeout.title: Llm Timeout

parallel_test_cases.description: Max concurrent multi-turn test cases (FR-009a). Resolved via CLI > YAML > env > defaults (default 1).
parallel_test_cases.title: Parallel Test Cases

ExecutionConfig.title: ExecutionConfig

ExpectedTool.description:
Object form of an expected tool assertion (FR-003).

A bare string like `"subtract"` is promoted to
`ExpectedTool(name="subtract", args=None, count=1)` by the list
pre-validator on the enclosing model, but this class itself only holds
the object shape.
ExpectedTool.title: ExpectedTool

ExportersConfig.description:
Container for exporter configurations.

Note: If no exporters are explicitly enabled, console exporter is used
as the default for development/debugging purposes.

console.description: Console exporter (default if no other exporters)

ExportersConfig.title: ExportersConfig

FileInput.description:
File input for multimodal test cases.

Represents a single file reference for test case inputs, supporting
both local files and remote URLs with optional extraction parameters.

type.description: File type: image, pdf, text, excel, word, powerpoint, csv
type.title: Type

cache.description: Cache remote files (default true for URLs)
cache.title: Cache

FileInput.title: FileInput

FunctionTool.description: Function tool for calling Python functions.

defer_loading.description: If True, tool is excluded from initial context and loaded on-demand via semantic search. Set to False for critical tools.
defer_loading.title: Defer Loading

FunctionTool.title: FunctionTool

GCPCloudRunConfig.description:
GCP Cloud Run deployment configuration.

Attributes:
    project_id: GCP project ID
    region: GCP region for deployment
    memory: Memory allocation (e.g., 512Mi, 1Gi)
    cpu: vCPU allocation (1, 2, or 4)
    concurrency: Maximum concurrent requests per instance
    timeout: Request timeout in seconds
    min_instances: Minimum instances
    max_instances: Maximum instances
GCPCloudRunConfig.title: GCPCloudRunConfig

GEvalMetric.description:
G-Eval custom criteria metric configuration.

Uses discriminator pattern with type="geval" to distinguish from standard
EvaluationMetric instances in a discriminated union.

G-Eval enables custom evaluation criteria defined in natural language,
using chain-of-thought prompting with LLM-based scoring.

Example:
    >>> metric = GEvalMetric(
    ...     name="Professionalism",
    ...     criteria="Evaluate if the response uses professional language",
    ...     threshold=0.7
    ... )

type.description: Discriminator field - always 'geval' for GEval metrics
type.title: Type

evaluation_steps.description: Explicit evaluation steps (auto-generated from criteria if None)
evaluation_steps.title: Evaluation Steps

evaluation_params.description: Test case fields to include in evaluation
evaluation_params.title: Evaluation Params

model.description: LLM model override for this metric

fail_on_error.description: Fail test if metric evaluation fails
fail_on_error.title: Fail On Error

GEvalMetric.title: GEvalMetric

HierarchicalDocumentToolConfig.description:
Configuration for the HierarchicalDocumentTool.

A specialized document search tool that preserves document structure,
supports multiple search modalities (semantic, keyword, exact), and
enables context-aware embeddings for improved retrieval quality.

Features:
- Structure-aware chunking that respects markdown headings
- Hybrid search combining semantic, keyword, and exact matching
- Contextual embeddings that include document/section context
- Automatic definition and cross-reference extraction
- Optional reranking for improved result quality

source.description: Path to markdown document or directory containing markdown files. Supports glob patterns for multiple files.
source.title: Source

chunking_strategy.description: Document chunking approach: 'structure' parses markdown headings, 'token' uses fixed token-based splitting

document_domain.description: Document structure domain for subsection detection. Options: 'none' (default), 'us_legislative', 'au_legislative', 'academic', 'technical', 'legal_contract'. When set to a domain, enables recognition of implicit headings like (a), (1), Step 1, etc.

max_subsection_depth.description: Maximum subsection nesting depth. If None (default), uses all patterns defined for the document_domain. Set to limit depth, e.g., 2 to only recognize Title and Chapter but not Section and below.
max_subsection_depth.title: Max Subsection Depth

top_k.description: Number of results to return (1-100, default 10)
top_k.title: Top K

min_score.description: Minimum similarity score threshold for results (0.0-1.0)
min_score.title: Min Score

semantic_weight.description: Weight for semantic search in hybrid mode (default 0.5)
semantic_weight.title: Semantic Weight

keyword_weight.description: Weight for keyword search in hybrid mode (default 0.3)
keyword_weight.title: Keyword Weight

exact_weight.description: Weight for exact search in hybrid mode (default 0.2)
exact_weight.title: Exact Weight

rrf_k.description: Reciprocal Rank Fusion constant for hybrid search (default 60). Higher values give more weight to lower-ranked results.
rrf_k.title: Rrf K

contextual_embeddings.description: Enable contextual embeddings that include document/section context for improved semantic understanding
contextual_embeddings.title: Contextual Embeddings

context_max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens for context summary (50-200, default 100)
context_max_tokens.title: Context Max Tokens

extract_definitions.description: Extract and index term definitions from documents
extract_definitions.title: Extract Definitions

extract_cross_references.description: Extract and resolve cross-references between sections
extract_cross_references.title: Extract Cross References

enable_reranking.description: Enable LLM-based reranking of search results
enable_reranking.title: Enable Reranking

reranker_model.description: LLM for reranking results. Required when enable_reranking=True.

context_model.description: LLM for contextual embedding generation. Overrides the default model used by LLMContextGenerator.

embedding_model.description: Custom embedding model (defaults to provider default)
embedding_model.title: Embedding Model

database.description:
Vector database configuration. Can be:
- DatabaseConfig object with provider and connection details
- String reference to a named vectorstore in global config
- None for in-memory storage
database.title: Database

keyword_index.description: Keyword index configuration for sparse/BM25 search. If None, defaults to in-memory BM25.

defer_loading.description: If True, tool is excluded from initial context and loaded on-demand via semantic search. Set to False for critical tools.
defer_loading.title: Defer Loading

HierarchicalDocumentToolConfig.title: HierarchicalDocumentToolConfig

Instructions.description:
System instructions specification (file or inline).

Represents the system prompt for an agent, supporting both
file references and inline text.
Instructions.title: Instructions

KeywordIndexConfig.description:
Keyword index configuration for sparse/BM25 search backend.

Two providers:
- in-memory: rank_bm25 in-process (default, dev/local)
- opensearch: OpenSearch endpoint (production)

When provider='opensearch', endpoint and index_name are required
(validated at model construction time).
KeywordIndexConfig.title: KeywordIndexConfig

LLMProvider.description:
LLM provider configuration.

Specifies which LLM provider and model to use, along with model parameters.

endpoint.description: API endpoint (required for Azure OpenAI and Ollama)
endpoint.title: Endpoint

auth_provider.description: Authentication method for Anthropic provider. Defaults to api_key. Ignored for non-Anthropic providers.

LLMProvider.title: LLMProvider

LogsConfig.description:
Logging-specific configuration.

Controls structured logging settings including log level,
trace context inclusion, and namespace filtering.

include_trace_context.description: Include trace/span IDs in log records
include_trace_context.title: Include Trace Context

LogsConfig.title: LogsConfig

MCPTool.description:
MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool for standardized integrations.

Supports four transport types:
- stdio (default): Local MCP servers via subprocess
- sse: Remote servers via Server-Sent Events
- websocket: Bidirectional WebSocket communication
- http: Streamable HTTP transport

For stdio transport, only npx, uvx, or docker commands are allowed
for security reasons.

defer_loading.description: If True, tool is excluded from initial context and loaded on-demand via semantic search. Set to False for critical tools.
defer_loading.title: Defer Loading

command.description: Command to run (required for stdio: npx, uvx, or docker)

is_retrieval.description: Mark this MCP tool as a retrieval tool for RAG evaluation metrics. When True, tool results contribute to retrieval_context for metrics like Faithfulness, ContextualRelevancy, ContextualPrecision, and ContextualRecall.
is_retrieval.title: Is Retrieval

registry_name.description: Full reverse-DNS name from MCP registry (e.g., 'io.github.user/server'). Used for duplicate detection and origin tracking. None for manually configured MCP servers.
registry_name.title: Registry Name

MCPTool.title: MCPTool

MetricsConfig.description:
Metrics-specific configuration.

Controls metrics collection settings including export interval
and Semantic Kernel metrics inclusion.
MetricsConfig.title: MetricsConfig

OTLPExporterConfig.description:
OTLP exporter configuration.

Configures export to OTLP collectors (Jaeger, Honeycomb, Datadog, etc.)
via gRPC or HTTP protocol.
OTLPExporterConfig.title: OTLPExporterConfig

ObservabilityConfig.description:
Top-level observability configuration.

Root configuration for OpenTelemetry observability features.
Service name defaults to 'holodeck-{agent.name}' if not explicitly set.
ObservabilityConfig.title: ObservabilityConfig

PermissionMode.description: Level of autonomous action for Claude Agent SDK.
PermissionMode.title: PermissionMode

PrometheusExporterConfig.description:
Prometheus exporter configuration.

Exposes metrics via HTTP endpoint for Prometheus scraping.
PrometheusExporterConfig.title: PrometheusExporterConfig

PromptTool.description: Prompt-based tool for AI-powered semantic functions.

defer_loading.description: If True, tool is excluded from initial context and loaded on-demand via semantic search. Set to False for critical tools.
defer_loading.title: Defer Loading

PromptTool.title: PromptTool

ProtocolType.description: API protocol types for agent serving.
ProtocolType.title: ProtocolType

RAGMetric.description:
RAG pipeline evaluation metric configuration.

Uses discriminator pattern with type="rag" to distinguish from standard
EvaluationMetric and GEvalMetric instances in a discriminated union.

RAG metrics evaluate the quality of retrieval-augmented generation pipelines:
- Faithfulness: Detects hallucinations by comparing response to context
- ContextualRelevancy: Measures relevance of retrieved chunks to query
- ContextualPrecision: Evaluates ranking quality of retrieved chunks
- ContextualRecall: Measures retrieval completeness against expected output

Example:
    >>> metric = RAGMetric(
    ...     metric_type=RAGMetricType.FAITHFULNESS,
    ...     threshold=0.8
    ... )

type.description: Discriminator field - always 'rag' for RAG metrics
type.title: Type

model.description: LLM model override for this metric

fail_on_error.description: Fail test if metric evaluation fails
fail_on_error.title: Fail On Error

RAGMetric.title: RAGMetric

RAGMetricType.description:
RAG pipeline evaluation metric types.

These metrics evaluate the quality of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
pipelines by assessing various aspects of retrieval and response generation.
RAGMetricType.title: RAGMetricType

RegistryConfig.description:
Container registry configuration.

Attributes:
    url: Registry URL (e.g., ghcr.io, docker.io, ECR URL)
    repository: Repository name (e.g., org/agent-name)
    tag_strategy: Strategy for generating image tags
    custom_tag: Custom tag when tag_strategy is CUSTOM
    credentials_env_prefix: Prefix for credential environment variables

custom_tag.description: Custom tag when tag_strategy is CUSTOM
custom_tag.title: Custom Tag

RegistryConfig.title: RegistryConfig

SearchMode.description:
Search modality options for HierarchicalDocumentTool.

Defines which search indices are used during query:
- SEMANTIC: Dense embeddings only (conceptual similarity)
- KEYWORD: BM25 sparse index only (term frequency)
- HYBRID: Keyword + semantic combined with RRF fusion
SearchMode.title: SearchMode

SubagentSpec.description:
A single subagent definition for multi-agent orchestration.

Each entry under ``claude.agents`` becomes an
``claude_agent_sdk.types.AgentDefinition`` on
``ClaudeAgentOptions.agents``. The SDK uses ``description`` for routing.

US3 validators (prompt/prompt_file mutual exclusion and file resolution)
are deliberately omitted here — they belong to the US3 task slice.

description.description: Human-readable description used by the parent agent for routing decisions. Required by the SDK.
description.title: Description

prompt.description: Inline system prompt for the subagent. Mutually exclusive with prompt_file.
prompt.title: Prompt

prompt_file.description: Path to a file containing the subagent's system prompt. Resolved relative to the agent.yaml directory. Mutually exclusive with prompt. File contents are inlined at config-load time.
prompt_file.title: Prompt File

tools.description: Allowlist of tool names. When null/omitted, the subagent inherits all parent tools.
tools.title: Tools

model.description: Model override for this subagent. Must be one of the SDK's literal aliases: 'sonnet', 'opus', 'haiku', 'inherit'. Full model IDs (e.g. 'claude-haiku-4-5') are rejected — the Claude CLI silently drops AgentDefinitions whose `model` is not in this set, so the validator catches it at config-load time.
model.title: Model

SubagentSpec.title: SubagentSpec

TagStrategy.description: Strategy for generating container image tags.
TagStrategy.title: TagStrategy

TestCaseModel.description:
Test case for agent evaluation.

Represents a single test scenario. Either legacy single-turn (with
`input`) or multi-turn (with `turns`), but not both.

input.description: User query or prompt (required when `turns` is absent)
input.title: Input

retrieval_context.description: Retrieved text chunks for RAG evaluation metrics
retrieval_context.title: Retrieval Context

evaluations.description: Per-test metric overrides (standard, GEval, RAG, or code)
evaluations.title: Evaluations

turns.description: Ordered multi-turn conversation (feature 032). Mutually exclusive with `input` / `ground_truth` / top-level `expected_tools` / `files` / `retrieval_context`.
turns.title: Turns

TestCaseModel.title: TestCaseModel

ToolFilterConfig.description:
Configuration for automatic tool filtering.

Defines how tools are filtered per request to reduce token usage.
When enabled, only the most relevant tools (based on semantic similarity
to the user query) are included in each LLM call.

Attributes:
    enabled: Enable or disable tool filtering globally.
    top_k: Maximum number of tools to include per request.
    similarity_threshold: Minimum similarity score for tool inclusion.
    always_include: Tool names that are always included regardless of score.
    always_include_top_n_used: Number of most-used tools to always include.
    search_method: Method for tool search (semantic, bm25, or hybrid).

always_include.description: Tool names always included in context
always_include.title: Always Include

always_include_top_n_used.description: Number of most-used tools to always include (0-20)
always_include_top_n_used.title: Always Include Top N Used

search_method.description: Tool search method: semantic, bm25, or hybrid
search_method.title: Search Method

ToolFilterConfig.title: ToolFilterConfig

TracingConfig.description:
Tracing-specific configuration.

Controls distributed tracing settings including sampling rate,
content capture, and redaction patterns for sensitive data.

capture_content.description: Capture prompts and completions in spans (sensitive data)
capture_content.title: Capture Content

capture_evaluation_content.description: Capture evaluation inputs (input, actual_output, expected_output) in spans (sensitive data)
capture_evaluation_content.title: Capture Evaluation Content

redaction_patterns.description: Regex patterns for redacting sensitive data
redaction_patterns.title: Redaction Patterns

TracingConfig.title: TracingConfig

TransportType.description:
Supported MCP transport types.

Defines the communication protocol used to connect to MCP servers:
- STDIO: Local process via stdin/stdout (default, most common)
- SSE: Server-Sent Events over HTTP
- WEBSOCKET: WebSocket for bidirectional communication
- HTTP: Streamable HTTP transport
TransportType.title: TransportType

Turn.description:
Single exchange within a multi-turn test case (data-model.md §1).

A multi-turn test case is an ordered list of turns driven through a
single AgentSession. Each turn owns its own input, optional ground
truth, expected tools, files, retrieval context, and metric overrides.

ground_truth.description: Expected output for this turn (non-empty if provided)
ground_truth.title: Ground Truth

expected_tools.description: Tools expected to be called during this turn. Mixed list of bare strings (legacy name-only) and ExpectedTool objects (US3).
expected_tools.title: Expected Tools

files.description: Multimodal file inputs for this turn
files.title: Files

retrieval_context.description: Retrieved text chunks for RAG evaluation on this turn
retrieval_context.title: Retrieval Context

turn_config.description: Free-form per-turn config surfaced to code graders as ``ctx.turn_config`` (contracts/code-grader-contract.md §3.1). Used for grader-specific keys such as ``turn_program``.
turn_config.title: Turn Config

Turn.title: Turn

VectorstoreTool.description: Vectorstore tool for semantic search over documents.

defer_loading.description: If True, tool is excluded from initial context and loaded on-demand via semantic search. Set to False for critical tools.
defer_loading.title: Defer Loading

source.description: Path to data file or directory
source.title: Source

embedding_model.description: Custom embedding model (defaults to provider default)
embedding_model.title: Embedding Model

embedding_dimensions.description: Embedding vector dimensions (auto-detected from model if not specified)
embedding_dimensions.title: Embedding Dimensions

database.description:
Vector database configuration. Can be:
- DatabaseConfig object with provider and connection details
- String reference to a named vectorstore in global config
- None for in-memory storage
database.title: Database

top_k.description: Number of top results to return from search
top_k.title: Top K

min_similarity_score.description: Minimum similarity score threshold for results (0.0-1.0)
min_similarity_score.title: Min Similarity Score

id_field.description: Unique record identifier field (required for structured data mode). Must be set when vector_field is specified.
id_field.title: Id Field

field_separator.description: Separator for concatenating multiple vector_fields (default: newline). Used when vector_field is a list.
field_separator.title: Field Separator

delimiter.description: CSV delimiter character (auto-detect if None). Only applicable for CSV files.
delimiter.title: Delimiter

VectorstoreTool.title: VectorstoreTool

description:
Agent configuration entity.

Root configuration for a single AI agent instance, defining model,
instructions, tools, evaluations, and test cases.

response_format.description: Response format schema (inline dict, file path, or null)
response_format.title: Response Format

tool_filtering.description: Automatic tool filtering configuration. When enabled, dynamically filters tools per request based on semantic similarity to reduce token usage.

embedding_provider.description: Provider for embedding generation. Required when provider: anthropic + vectorstore tools.

claude.description: Claude Agent SDK-specific settings. Applicable only when model.provider: anthropic.

title: Agent
